subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: There are two schools which believe in the rebirth of the soul - the reincarnation and metempsychosis. The first school believes that the spirit of man
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @passage of elementary matter through degrees of existence, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @return of the Manifestations of God, @reincarnation, @John the Baptist, @elementary matter cannot be annihilated
